title: Calanthe villosagastris
taxonomy: Calanthe villosagastris is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Calanthe and the family Orchidaceae. The genus Calanthe is further classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted to be in the order Asparagales. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other species.
uses: Calanthe villosagastris is known to have various medicinal properties.
